final_answer:
Routed the Google Trends learning frontier through the human-gated self-improvement loop: of 80 trending prompts, the engine already resolves 20 and leaves 60 on the learning frontier. Every frontier trace was handed to the issue-#558 learner, which — because trending searches are open-domain questions, not program-plan modifiers — proposed 0 rules and adopted 0: nothing changes without human review. The report is a pure function of the committed catalog.
